title: Fire Expansion
description: A small Datapack/Mod to add some new items like a new weapon.
body:
![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/577a53b36ec780f47f60b532dd7e0ef598b2d887.png)


## **About** 🛠️

### STICKMAN API IS REQUIRED ON VERSION 1.2.1+. GET STICKMAN API **[HERE](https://modrinth.com/mod/stickman-api)**.

If you are using the datapack, please also use the downloaded file as a resource pack.
The textures are integrated in the mod version. The item "Borcher" is Inspired by the item "Scorcher" from the Mod "Dungeon now Loading". This Pack adds some useful items and Advancements.
For more info, click through this:

**DO NOT use Mods like JEI** - They Wont work, because the Mod is just a Packaged Datapack!

Huge thanks to **Shadowwalker145** for the amazing music disc **Escape to Death**! Please note: **Escape to Death** is only **available** in version **B1.1+**.

### **FOR DATAPACK USERS: THE DATAPACK IS THE RESOURCEPACK TOO**

### **INCOMPATIBLE WITH LEXTER'S CATACLYSM**

## **Content ✨**

Visit a Trail Chambers, and with a small Chance you will optain the "Bucket of Ministrosity" (3,25%). Hold it in your main/offhand and right-click to get a 27-Slot space for your loot. Get the "Monstrous" Enchantment out of an vault too and Enchant it on your leggings. If any entity attacks you they will get launched up into the air (Level 1 = 33% Boosted in air, Level 2 = 66%, Level 3 = 99%) and If you have a second Heavy Core... just craft it into a "Combustion Cell":

![cell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7478120b80c5e1822ee993a3cb6b052a390750c4.png)

Use this cell to craft the "Borcher" like this:

![borcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/166a8360326c9660805203ca07c3d8a16e83596d.png)

The Borcher consumes one coal every 1.5 Seconds. It can fire 8 Seconds, before going into "overheat" mode. Just wait until the bar in your actionbar if full white.
Here are the 2 Advancements for Collecting those 3 Items: 

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/794a446dd050e0bc602e2503c8417999333d094a.png)
